description_long: This is a male adult figure dressed in a belted, collared uniform with long sleeves and pants, featuring wide cuffs and a structured fit. The outfit includes a prominent belt at the waist and matching boots, giving the appearance of a formal or possibly military-inspired attire. The figure's arms are extended horizontally, and the hands are open with fingers slightly spread. The facial features are angular, with a stern expression and neatly styled, short hair combed to the side. The clothing appears to be made of a fabric-like material, while the boots have a more rigid, structured look. The overall build is athletic, and the figure stands upright, ready for action or patrol in an urban environment.
description: A male adult in a belted, collared uniform with structured boots and short, neatly styled hair, standing upright with arms extended. The attire is formal and fitted, suggesting a professional or official role.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full uniform, facial features, and open hands with arms extended horizontally.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the structured fit of the uniform, and the boots' shape.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the uniform, the belt, and the back of the head and boots.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, arm, and the side seam of the uniform.
attribute_clothing_type: belted collared uniform with long sleeves and structured pants, featuring wide cuffs and a prominent waist belt
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: short, neatly combed hair with a side part
